name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

SIGNOZ_REGION.title: SigNoz Cloud Region
SIGNOZ_REGION.description: Your SigNoz Cloud region code: us, us2, eu, eu2, in, or in2. Find it under Settings -> Ingestion (region reference: https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/keys/). Leave empty if you run self-hosted SigNoz.

SIGNOZ_SELF_HOSTED.title: Self-hosted SigNoz? (type yes / no)
SIGNOZ_SELF_HOSTED.description: Type yes if you run your own SigNoz instead of SigNoz Cloud; leave blank or type no for SigNoz Cloud. If yes, the region above is ignored and you'll be prompted to point the plugin at your MCP URL with /signoz-mcp-setup after install.
